pi_items.source: Task description instructions and export_result.sh verification variables
Task description instructions and export_result.sh verification variables
Task description explicit instruction 'exactly 500 pixels' and verifier.py exact match requirement
Task description explicitly requires 100 milliseconds, which corresponds to 10 centisecond ticks in ImageMagick as verified by export_result.sh and verifier.py
Task description explicitly requires background color #333333 and export_result.sh checks for this specific hex code
Task description explicitly requires text color #FFFFFF and export_result.sh checks for this specific hex code

privileged_info_summary: Confirmed that the primary data source is the real historical Muybridge race horse animated GIF from Wikimedia Commons, downloaded via setup_task.sh. Discovered a contradiction: the prompt states there are '11 raw historical photographs', but the real downloaded GIF actually unpacks into 15 frames (the fallback synthetic generation loop explicitly generates 11 frames, which likely caused this error). Verified all required target paths, an expected ImageMagick tick delay of 10 (100ms), an expected image width of 500px, and the required HTML color codes (#333333 and #FFFFFF) exactly match the task description and verifier logic.
